name: research-task-system
description: TODO-centered, rule-driven human-governed research workflows with persistent YAML state, explicit self-transitions, exact rule-path approval, Python/MATLAB execution, complete evidence, Work table curation, and reproducible figures.

interface.shortDescription: Route rule-driven research across Work and Codex
interface.longDescription: Author one complete research TODO, maintain a rule-driven YAML lifecycle with versioned transition rules, explicit self-transitions, Codex recommendations, and human-confirmed rule paths; execute Python or MATLAB research code, preserve complete evidence, curate tables, and produce reproducible Work figures without parallel scientific handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Use Research Task System to author complete TODO specifications from this research material.
Use Research Task System to initialize or inspect task state, evaluate all outgoing rules including self, and wait for human confirmation of one rule path.
Use Research Task System to execute the recorded current state of this TODO.
Use Research Task System to curate completed tables and create reproducible figures after work_postprocessing is confirmed, then mark Codex transition evaluation as required.
